Note: Participant states he would like the verbal confirmation that his photo has been sent. When he tells Meta to send picture, it asks to confirm who he is sending picture to, and after he says “yes” Meta says “sending”, but Meta never confirms that the picture has been sent.
After sending a photo, participant asked Meta if the last video had been sent. Meta responded “No new messages”. Participant notes it did not check what he asked it to.
Participant asked Meta to zoom in twice, using slightly different voice commands each time. Checked the sent images and notes that Meta did not zoom in.

Participant said “Hey Meta, zoom in on the bookshelf”. Meta said “Image is being created. Check Meta AI app”. He is able to see two pictures created in the Meta AI app and states it “might have kind of zoomed in a little bit”.
Participant wonders if Meta has trouble picking up his speech because his “s” sounds are slightly slurred since his dental work.

If he was watching TV and wanted to send a picture of what he was watching, he would want to zoom in on just the TV.
